etymology.description: 小(小) (xiǎo, "small") + 時(時) (shí, "time") + 候(候) (hòu, "time period") = phase of smallness -> childhood
etymology.interpretation: 小時候 refers to the time period when one is small, or in other words, one's childhood. It emphasizes the phase of life characterized by being young and small.

parts.english: time period; time; moment; length of time

examples.chinese: 小时候(小時候)，我常常在公园玩耍(我常常在公園玩耍)。
examples.pinyin: Xiǎoshíhou, wǒ chángcháng zài gōngyuán wánshuǎ.
examples.english: During childhood, I often played in the park.

examples.chinese: 她小时候(她小時候)喜欢听爷爷讲故事(喜歡聽爺爺講故事)。
examples.pinyin: Tā xiǎoshíhou xǐhuan tīng yéye jiǎng gùshì.
examples.english: She liked to listen to grandpa tell stories during her childhood.

examples.chinese: 我的小时候(我的小時候)充满了快乐和笑声(充滿了快樂和笑聲)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ de xiǎoshíhou chōngmǎnle kuàilè hé xiàoshēng.
examples.english: My childhood was filled with joy and laughter.
